libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required. Generated tests should define a minimal @SpringBootApplication with at least one @RestController endpoint, start it with --server.port=0, call the assigned local port, exercise /v3/api-docs and a Swagger UI route such as /swagger-ui.html or swagger initializer/static resource handling, and close the application context.

deterministic_setup.reason:
springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui:3.0.3 is an add-on for a Spring Boot WebMVC app. Its resolved dependencies include Spring Boot WebMVC support but not the normal WebMVC starter with embedded Tomcat/servlet runtime; adding the matching Boot 4.0.5 starter makes servlet endpoints and UI resource han
...[truncated]

risks: Without the WebMVC starter, tests may only load a generic Spring context and miss the library's web auto-configuration paths.

Full embedded Tomcat/Spring Boot native-image tests can be heavier than simple unit tests; keep coverage focused on springdoc endpoints and resource transformation rather than browser-level UI behavior.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Meaningful coverage needs a real Spring Boot WebMVC servlet application; the requested springdoc UI artifact alone starts as a non-web context, so its /v3/api-docs and Swagger UI paths are not reachable.
